diagrams.title: Distributed System Architecture Layers
diagrams.description: Shows the layered architecture of distributed systems from hardware to applications
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how different layers interact and where middleware fits in hiding distribution complexity

diagrams.title: CAP Theorem Triangle
diagrams.description: Visual representation showing the three properties of CAP theorem and trade-offs during network partitions
elements: Partition constraint arc (between C and A)
diagrams.purpose: Understand that during network partitions, must choose between Consistency or Availability

diagrams.title: Client-Server Interaction Flow
diagrams.description: Sequence diagram showing request-response flow in client-server model
diagrams.purpose: Understand basic communication pattern in distributed systems and role of middleware
